top_signals.title: SQM Boosts Lithium Guidance as Earnings Top Estimates
top_signals.summary: SQM reported a sharp increase in first-quarter profit and raised its lithium sales forecast, betting that robust demand from battery storage systems will keep the market tightly supplied.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
